text_excerpt: Campaigns | Caroline Dinenage MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home News In Parliament Local Campaigns Newsletters Contact Campaigns Expanding Health Provision Across the Constituency Caroline has been a regular campaigner for health and social care provision since her election in 2010. This passion was recognised when she was appointed as... Improving Links Across Portsmouth Harbour Caroline has a deep appreciation for the historical link which Gosport shares with Portsmouth. Connectivity across the harbour has played a vital role in... Monitoring Haslar Immigration Removal Centre The Home Office is still in the process of redeveloping the Haslar IRC site - which was delayed due to a number of factors including asbestos. When it reopens... Cleaning Up Our Seas and Waterways Caroline regularly meets with Southern Water and keeps local people updated on what she is doing to ensure that the water infrastructure is appropriate. In... Regenerating Fort Blockhouse Caroline has emphasised the potential of Fort Blockhouse to make a significant economic contribution to Gosport in the House of Commons Chamber on many... Supporting Local Community Organisations Caroline believes that voluntary organisations are the backbone of the Gosport Constituency’s community.
